channel.title: AI × CFD Morning Brief
channel.description: 私人 AI、CFD、科技和商业投资晨间有声简报。
channel.itunes:author: Private AI Brief

item.title: 2026-07-01: 从18年bug到新基准，AI正在深入基础设施与科研
item.description: - Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug - OpenAI Blog - How ChatGPT adoption has expanded - OpenAI Blog - Start building with Nano Banana 2 Lite and Gemini Omni Flash - Google DeepMind Blog - Introducing GeneBench-Pro - OpenAI Blog - https://openai.com/index/core-dump-epidemiology-data-infrastructure-bug - https://openai.com/index/how-chatgpt-adoption-has-expanded - https://deepmind.google/blog/start-building-with-nano-banana-2-lite-and-gemini-omni-flash/ - https://openai.com/index/introducing-genebench-pro
